title: Eva After the End
wikitext:
[]: Eva: After the End             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Fri Jul 01, 2011 9:44 pm I stumbled onto this after nuking my brain on pages and pages of Shadowjack commentary on the series (SO WORTH IT): You all have probably seen it before, but what the heck. [url]http://video.google.com/videoplay?docid=561267206269213819#[/url] An audio drama (with fanmade visuals) performed by the original Eva cast (and Anno!) that mercilessly parodies itself when The Suits request a new cash-cow series to milk. I thought it was an absolute riot...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 01, 2011 9:57 pm Highly relevant, especially if you want to download the original video: http://www.evamonkey.com/after-the-end/

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 01, 2011 10:15 pm I've just noticed that on the website of the "picsubber" there's an MP4 (AVC/AAC) version of that video, it's higher resolution and definitely less blocky than the AVI (Divx3/MP3) hosted on your site, EvaMonkey. This is the link to the page hosting the video: http://www.absolutedestiny.org/vid/4/

[]: After The End             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon May 06, 2013 1:42 pm Just watched the Picsub of Evangelion: After The End, and oh my goodness, it is one of the funniest things I have ever seen. Asuka coming up with all sorts of hare-brained schemes to increase the ratings, Rei's complete indifference to everything, Kaworu objecting to being referred to as "homo", Shinji's irritation at being replaced as main character, Asuka's annoyance at the visibility of her "breast nubbins", Anno as Space Black God (Holy shit, Anno sounds terrifying), and of course, Angel Attack with only voice effects and no visuals...it's all just completely brilliant. Anyone else familiar with this masterpiece?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 06, 2013 2:01 pm Everything you need to know about this, including downloads are here: http://www.evamonkey.com/after-the-end/

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon May 06, 2013 2:20 pm I vaguely remember mentioning it but I think that you should upgrade your download link with the file available here , this mp4 isn't a mere re-encode of the old avi, it's visibly crisper and it's probably been encoded from the Premiere project files.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 06, 2013 4:48 pm For a while, based on Asuka's slutsuit in Ha, and the outer-space action in the first Q teasers, we wondered whether the script for Rebuild was being taken from After the End , and we'd end up with a sentai team (Mari as the Pink Ranger) going to do battle with the Black Space God.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon May 06, 2013 6:08 pm Mr. Tines wrote: For a while, based on Asuka's slutsuit in Ha, and the outer-space action in the first Q teasers, we wondered whether the script for Rebuild was being taken from After the End , and we'd end up with a sentai team (Mari as the Pink Ranger) going to do battle with the Black Space God.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue May 07, 2013 8:22 am This was written by Anno? It is Anno's Eva parody?
